scenario_goal: Ask GRC Agent to rewire the copied graph so analog_random_source_x_0 output 0 feeds blocks_char_to_float_0 input 0 directly instead of the existing blocks_throttle2_0 output 0 to blocks_char_to_float_0 input 0 connection.
allowed_user_behavior: Ask naturally to replace the blocks_throttle2_0 to blocks_char_to_float_0 connection with analog_random_source_x_0 to blocks_char_to_float_0.
Mention the endpoint ports as output 0 and input 0.
forbidden_user_behavior: Do not mention internal tool names, JSON, schemas, or judge expectations.
Do not ask to edit raw YAML.
Do not ask to save or load.
